resourceTemplates.name: linkedin-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Get LinkedIn person profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns a person's public LinkedIn profile, including publicly available recent posts. Use the public profile `url`.

resourceTemplates.name: linkedin-company
resourceTemplates.title: Get LinkedIn company page
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public LinkedIn company page information by company `url`.

resourceTemplates.name: linkedin-company-posts
resourceTemplates.title: Get LinkedIn company posts
resourceTemplates.description: Returns posts from a LinkedIn company page by `url`. Supports optional pagination with `page`, with a maximum of 7 pages due to LinkedIn limitations.

resourceTemplates.name: linkedin-post
resourceTemplates.title: Get LinkedIn post
resourceTemplates.description: Returns a LinkedIn post or article by public URL.
